channel.title: M365 Deprecation Timeline — A Guide to Cloud
channel.description: Microsoft 365 deprecation and retirement timeline — urgency-scored, filterable, with migration guidance.

item.title: ⛔ Azure Application Gateway V1 Retirement — 2026-04-28
item.description:
🔴 TODAY — Azure Application Gateway V1 SKU will be fully retired.
Migration: Migrate to Application Gateway V2 SKU.

item.title: ⛔ SharePoint Online Legacy Information Management Features Retirement — 2026-04-30
item.description:
🔴 2 days remaining — SharePoint Online is retiring several legacy compliance and records management features including Information Management Policies, In-Place Records Management, and deletion-only policies for documents.
Migration: Migrate to modern Microsoft Purview capabilities including Data Lifecycle Management and Purview Records Management.

item.title: 📅 .NET 9 End of Support — 2026-05-12
item.description:
🔴 14 days remaining — .NET 9 (STS release) reaches end of support. No more security or non-security updates will be provided.
Migration: Upgrade to .NET 10 (LTS) when available, or continue on .NET 8 (LTS, supported until Nov 2026).

item.title: 📅 Microsoft Configuration Manager Version 2409 End of Support — 2026-06-06
item.description:
🟠 39 days remaining — Configuration Manager (SCCM) version 2409 reaches end of servicing.
Migration: Update to the latest current branch version of Configuration Manager.

item.title: 📅 SharePoint Server 2016 End of Support — 2026-07-14
item.description:
🟠 77 days remaining — SharePoint Server 2016 reaches end of extended support. No security updates, non-security updates, or technical support after this date.
Migration: Migrate to SharePoint Server Subscription Edition or SharePoint Online (Microsoft 365).

item.title: 📅 SharePoint Server 2019 End of Support — 2026-07-14
item.description:
🟠 77 days remaining — SharePoint Server 2019 reaches end of extended support. No security updates, non-security updates, or technical support after this date.
Migration: Migrate to SharePoint Server Subscription Edition or SharePoint Online (Microsoft 365).

item.title: 📅 Project Server 2016 End of Support — 2026-07-14
item.description:
🟠 77 days remaining — Project Server 2016 reaches end of extended support.
Migration: Migrate to Project for the Web or Project Online.

item.title: 📅 Project Server 2019 End of Support — 2026-07-14
item.description:
🟠 77 days remaining — Project Server 2019 reaches end of extended support.
Migration: Migrate to Project for the Web or Project Online.

item.title: 📅 SQL Server 2016 End of Support — 2026-07-14
item.description:
🟠 77 days remaining — SQL Server 2016 reaches end of extended support. No more security patches unless you purchase Extended Security Updates (ESU) or migrate to Azure.
Migration: Upgrade to SQL Server 2022, migrate to Azure SQL, or purchase Extended Security Updates.

item.title: 📅 InfoPath 2013 End of Support — 2026-07-14
item.description:
🟠 77 days remaining — InfoPath 2013 reaches end of extended support. The last version of InfoPath ever released.
Migration: Migrate InfoPath forms to Power Apps or Microsoft Forms.

item.title: 📅 SharePoint Designer 2013 End of Support — 2026-07-14
item.description:
🟠 77 days remaining — SharePoint Designer 2013 reaches end of extended support. The last version of SharePoint Designer ever released.
Migration: Use Power Automate for workflows and SharePoint modern experience for page design.

item.title: 📅 SQL Server 2014 Extended Security Updates Year 2 End — 2026-07-14
item.description:
🟠 77 days remaining — SQL Server 2014 Extended Security Updates (Year 2) ends. No more security patches available through any program.
Migration: Migrate to Azure SQL or upgrade to SQL Server 2022.

item.title: ⛔ Azure AI Document Intelligence v2.0 API Retirement — 2026-08-31
item.description:
🟠 125 days remaining — Azure AI Document Intelligence (formerly Form Recognizer) v2.0 API will be retired.
Migration: Migrate to Azure AI Document Intelligence v3.1 GA or later.

item.title: ⛔ Computer Vision API v1.0-v3.1 Retirement — 2026-09-13
item.description:
🟠 138 days remaining — Azure Computer Vision API versions 1.0, 2.0, 2.1, 3.0, and 3.1 will all be retired simultaneously.
Migration: Migrate to the latest Computer Vision API (v4.0) or Azure AI Vision.

item.title: 📅 Azure Functions 1.x Runtime Deprecation — 2026-09-14
item.description:
🟠 139 days remaining — Support for Azure Functions runtime version 1.x ends. Functions on this runtime will continue to work but receive no patches.
Migration: Upgrade to Azure Functions runtime v4.x.

item.title: ⛔ Azure Monitor Data Collector API Retirement — 2026-09-14
item.description:
🟠 139 days remaining — The Data Collector API (HTTP Data Collector) for Azure Monitor Logs is being retired. Replace with Logs Ingestion API.
Migration: Migrate to the Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API.

item.title: ⛔ Azure Maps Gen1 Price Tier Retirement — 2026-09-15
item.description:
🟠 140 days remaining — Azure Maps Gen1 pricing tier will be retired. All Gen1 accounts will need to upgrade.
Migration: Upgrade to Azure Maps Gen2 pricing tier.

item.title: ⛔ Azure API for FHIR Retirement — 2026-09-30
item.description:
🟠 155 days remaining — Azure API for FHIR (Gen 1) will be fully retired. Service will no longer be available.
Migration: Migrate to Azure Health Data Services FHIR service (Gen 2).

item.title: ⛔ Project Online Retirement — 2026-09-30
item.description:
🟠 155 days remaining — Project Online is being retired. Organizations must migrate project management to Project for the Web.
Migration: Migrate to Project for the Web. Microsoft provides migration tools and guidance.

item.title: ⛔ Azure Virtual Desktop (Classic) Retirement — 2026-09-30
item.description:
🟠 155 days remaining — Azure Virtual Desktop (Classic), the Fall 2019 release, will be fully retired.
Migration: Migrate to Azure Virtual Desktop (ARM-based). Use the migration tool provided by Microsoft.

item.title: ⛔ Container Log V1 Table Retirement (Azure Monitor) — 2026-09-30
item.description:
🟠 155 days remaining — The ContainerLog (v1) table in Azure Monitor will be retired. Transition to ContainerLogV2.
Migration: Transition to ContainerLogV2 table which provides better schema and reduced costs.

item.title: ⛔ Azure Service Bus Track 0/1 SDKs and SBMP Protocol Retirement — 2026-09-30
item.description:
🟠 155 days remaining — Legacy Service Bus SDKs (Track 0 and Track 1) and the SBMP protocol will be retired. Also affects legacy control plane APIs.
Migration: Migrate to the latest Azure Service Bus SDK (Track 2) using AMQP protocol.

item.title: ⛔ Exchange Web Services (EWS) Retirement in Exchange Online — 2026-10-01
item.description:
🟠 156 days remaining — Exchange Web Services API will be fully retired in Exchange Online. EWS will stop accepting connections from all applications.
Migration: Migrate all EWS-based applications to Microsoft Graph API. Review the EWS to Graph migration guide.

item.title: ⛔ Entra ID Protection Risk Policy Retirement — 2026-10-01
item.description:
🟠 156 days remaining — Classic Entra ID Protection risk policies will be retired. Policies must be migrated to Conditional Access.
Migration: Migrate risk policies to Conditional Access policies with risk conditions.

item.title: ⛔ Azure Anomaly Detector Retirement — 2026-10-01
item.description:
🟠 156 days remaining — Azure AI Anomaly Detector service will be fully retired and no longer available.
Migration: Migrate to custom anomaly detection solutions using Azure Machine Learning or partner solutions.

item.title: ⛔ Azure Metrics Advisor Retirement — 2026-10-01
item.description:
🟠 156 days remaining — Azure AI Metrics Advisor service will be fully retired.
Migration: Use Azure Monitor or custom solutions for metrics analysis.

item.title: ⛔ Azure Personalizer Retirement — 2026-10-01
item.description:
🟠 156 days remaining — Azure AI Personalizer service will be fully retired.
Migration: Use Azure Machine Learning for personalisation scenarios.

item.title: ⛔ Microsoft Publisher Retirement — 2026-10-13
item.description:
🟠 168 days remaining — Microsoft Publisher will be fully retired. The application will no longer be included in Microsoft 365 or available as a standalone product.
Migration: Use Microsoft Designer, Word, or PowerPoint for desktop publishing. Use Canva or Adobe Express for marketing materials.

item.title: 📅 Office LTSC 2021 End of Support — 2026-10-13
item.description:
🟠 168 days remaining — Office LTSC 2021 (perpetual license) reaches end of mainstream support. Includes Access, Excel, OneNote, Outlook, PowerPoint, Project, Publisher, Visio, Word, and Skype for Business LTSC 2021.
Migration: Upgrade to Office LTSC 2024 or migrate to Microsoft 365 Apps (subscription).

item.title: 📅 Windows 10 2016 LTSB End of Support — 2026-10-13
item.description:
🟠 168 days remaining — Windows 10 Enterprise 2016 LTSB reaches end of extended support.
Migration: Upgrade to Windows 11 or Windows 10 IoT Enterprise LTSC 2021.

item.title: 📅 Windows Server 2012/R2 Extended Security Updates Year 3 End — 2026-10-13
item.description:
🟠 168 days remaining — Windows Server 2012 and 2012 R2 ESU Year 3 ends. Absolutely no more updates after this date unless migrated to Azure.
Migration: Migrate to Windows Server 2022 or Azure. Azure provides free ESUs for Server 2012 workloads.

item.title: 📅 Windows 11 Home and Pro Version 24H2 End of Servicing — 2026-10-13
item.description:
🟠 168 days remaining — Windows 11 Home and Pro version 24H2 reaches end of servicing.
Migration: Update to the latest Windows 11 feature update.

item.title: 📅 Windows Server 2022 Moves to Extended Support — 2026-10-13
item.description:
🟡 168 days remaining — Windows Server 2022 mainstream support ends. Moves to extended support phase — security updates continue but no new features or non-security hotfixes.
Migration: No immediate action required. Security updates continue in extended support. Plan future migration to Windows Server 2025.

item.title: 📅 Azure Functions In-Process Model (.NET) End of Support — 2026-11-10
item.description:
🟡 196 days remaining — The in-process hosting model for .NET apps in Azure Functions reaches end of support. Functions continue to run but receive no patches.
Migration: Migrate to the isolated worker model for .NET Azure Functions.

item.title: 📅 .NET 8 LTS End of Support — 2026-11-10
item.description:
🟡 196 days remaining — .NET 8 (Long Term Support) reaches end of support.
Migration: Upgrade to .NET 10 (LTS).

item.title: 📅 PowerShell 7.4 LTS End of Support — 2026-11-10
item.description:
🟡 196 days remaining — PowerShell 7.4 (Long Term Support) reaches end of support.
Migration: Upgrade to PowerShell 7.6 (LTS) when available.

item.title: 📅 Windows 11 Enterprise and Education Version 23H2 End of Servicing — 2026-11-10
item.description:
🟡 196 days remaining — Windows 11 Enterprise and Education version 23H2 reaches end of servicing.
Migration: Update to the latest Windows 11 feature update.

item.title: ⛔ Exchange Web Services (EWS) Full Retirement — All Exchange Online — 2027-04-01
item.description:
🟡 338 days remaining — Full and final retirement of EWS from Exchange Online. No EWS connections will be accepted from any application after this date.
Migration: Complete migration of all EWS applications to Microsoft Graph API.
